# viettelidc_ovpc_network_interfaces (Data Source)

List ViettelIDC NICs in a VPC with optional filters (client-side).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "viettelidc_ovpc_network_interfaces" "all" {
  vpc_id = viettelidc_ovpc_vpc.main.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `filters` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--filters))
- `vpc_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `network_interfaces` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--network_interfaces))

<a id="nestedatt--filters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filters`

Optional:

- `name` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `subnet_id` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--network_interfaces"></a>
### Nested Schema for `network_interfaces`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `ip_address` (String)
- `ip_assign_type` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `subnet_id` (String)
